text:
On 24/10/2011 07:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/phpldapadmin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/161954 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161954
> 

Maintainer approves.  Please commit.
